description.zh-cn: 储值充值：会员选择充值套餐(可设赠送)，复用现有支付网关(微信/支付宝等)生成充值订单，支付成功后自动把充值额+赠送额入账到会员余额，含充值记录。
description.en: Wallet recharge: members pick a top-up package (with optional bonus), pay via existing gateways (WeChat/Alipay) through a recharge order; balance (amount + bonus) is auto-credited on payment success, with records.
